disambiguation_rules.under_secretary_sec5: Under Secretary of Commerce for Standards and Technology (referenced in SEC. 5(a) and (b))

oddities.note: This text segment contains only the bill title and enacting clause. All substantive entities (Attorney General, Congress, NSF, DARPA, FTC, NIST) were extracted from earlier sections per the instruction note. This fragment represents the formal opening of the legislative text.
